arena-557.summary: Author addressed both inline review comments: (1) docstring rewording in subprocess.py, (2) reverted gr00t test skip back to @pytest.mark.with_subprocess. The Popen suggestion for timeout orphan cleanup was not addressed but was non-blocking.

5180.summary: Branch merged with develop (17 commits), but the actual PR fix in events.py is unchanged (same blob SHA). Changelog conflict resolved bumping to 4.5.28. PR already approved by AntoineRichard. No new issues to flag.
